classes.title: Clean disbursement (control)
classes.headline: Baseline: the write lands and the replay agrees.

classes.title: Partial save
classes.injected: core books the row but drops the funding memo field
classes.headline: UI says authorized and the replay reports success, but the booked row is missing the funding memo - no postcondition reads the ledger.
classes.example_reason: replay reported success but the booked row is wrong/incomplete (e.g. missing memo)

classes.title: Duplicate submission / non-idempotent retry
classes.injected: the authorize is submitted twice with no idempotency key
classes.headline: Two disbursements are booked; the borrower is paid twice while the replay reports a single clean success. Classic non-idempotency.
classes.example_reason: 2 disbursements booked (duplicate write); replay reported success=True

classes.title: Core timeout after successful write
classes.injected: core books the row, then hangs past the client timeout
classes.headline: The money moved but the replay reports failure - safe in the moment, yet a naive human/agent retry would double-pay.
classes.example_reason: the correct disbursement WAS booked but the replay reported failure (effect unverified; a retry would double-pay)

classes.title: Optimistic UI success then core rejection
classes.injected: UI paints authorized immediately; the core rejects the write
classes.headline: The screen says authorized, the replay reports success, and NOTHING was booked. Phantom success - the headline undetected failure.
classes.example_reason: replay reported success but NOTHING was booked (phantom success)

classes.title: Session expiry mid-workflow
classes.injected: the write returns 401; the app bounces to the login screen
classes.headline: The authorized-banner postcondition is not met (login screen shows) so the replay halts with no side effect. Correctly handled.

classes.title: Stale data / concurrent modification
classes.injected: last-write-wins over a loan a concurrent officer just held
classes.headline: A concurrent officer's URGENT fraud hold is silently overwritten (lost update); the disbursement proceeds and the replay reports a clean success.
classes.example_reason: concurrent officer's hold was overwritten (lost update); replay reported success=True

classes.title: Double-click registered by the environment
classes.injected: the authorize click is delivered twice, both reach the core
classes.headline: Same effect as a non-idempotent retry: two disbursements booked, one reported success. The replayer has no at-most-once guard.
classes.example_reason: 2 disbursements booked (duplicate write); replay reported success=True

classes.title: Idempotency key (the recommended fix)
classes.injected: authorize submitted twice, but the core de-duplicates on a key
classes.headline: With an idempotency key the double-submit collapses to one disbursement: the duplicate/double-click hazard is neutralized.

runs.reason: one correct, complete disbursement booked
